title: Kurivikod Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Kurivikod with a Z-Score of +4.00. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Kurivikod is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 13.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 70%, and wind speed is at 16.8 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, and the focus is on cooling.
conclusion: Implement immediate measures to mitigate the heat wave's impact in Kurivikod.
